hibernate-mapping.query: Select postingRule from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PostingRule as postingRule, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransactionState as finTxnState where finTxn.Id =:finTxnId and finTxnState.FinancialTransaction.Id = finTxn.Id and finTxnState.TransactionStateEffectiveDate >= FN_DATE_ADD(finTxn.CreatedDate, -2 , 'day') and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd=postingRule.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd and finTxnState.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd=postingRule.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd and (postingRule.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = :ledgerAccountCode or :ledgerAccountCode is null) order by postingRule.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd

Select postingRule from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PostingRule as postingRule, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LedgerAccount as ledgerAccount where postingRule.LedgerAccount=ledgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd and ledgerAccount.ReportingFrequency = :reportingFrequency
